title: taraxacum inclusum
intro: Taraxacum inclusum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion family with yellow flowers and edible leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum inclusum include reducing inflammation, promoting digestion, and supporting liver function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. Taraxacum inclusum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and its leaves and roots can be used in salads or as a cooked green.
